description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Release that triggers on release creation. The workflow should have three jobs: validate-version, build, and release. The validate-version job checks out the code, sets up Python 3.13, and validates the release version using make. The build job uses a reusable workflow from alexdlaird/pyngrok. The release job depends on build and validate-version, checks out the code, sets up Python 3.13, and publishes to PyPI using make upload with credentials from secrets.
